title: RFI 7309 Welsh black cattle registrations
body: "Request made under the Environmental Information Regulations 2004 (EIR) for the annual total for years 2003 to 2023 for the number of Welsh Black cattle issued with passports under Welsh Black (WB) and Welsh Black Cross (WBX) in the UK. Requesting to know the age at death on average of Welsh Black (WB) females. "
